message:
test(text-effects): add comprehensive reveal effect test suite (bd-vins)

Added 16 unit tests covering all reveal modes and the RevealMask effect:

Directional reveal modes:
- test_reveal_ltr_first_chars_first: LeftToRight shows first half at 0.5 progress
- test_reveal_rtl_last_chars_first: RightToLeft shows last half at 0.5 progress
- test_reveal_center_out_middle_first: CenterOut reveals center char first
- test_reveal_edges_in_edges_first: EdgesIn reveals edge chars first

Random mode:
- test_reveal_random_deterministic: Same seed produces identical visibility
- test_reveal_random_all_chars_reveal: All chars visible at progress=1.0

Semantic modes:
- test_reveal_by_word_whole_words: ByWord reveals complete words
- test_reveal_by_line_whole_lines: ByLine behavior for single-line text

RevealMask (angular sweep):
- test_reveal_mask_angle_0: Left-to-right sweep at angle 0
- test_reveal_mask_angle_90: Top-to-bottom sweep at angle 90
- test_reveal_mask_softness_0: Hard edge produces binary visibility
- test_reveal_mask_softness_1: Soft edge produces gradient fade

Edge cases:
- test_reveal_mode_default: Default mode is LeftToRight
- test_reveal_progress_boundaries: progress=0 all hidden, progress=1 all visible

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
